title: ExpressVPN Review 2026: Fast, Reliable, but Is It Worth the Price?
description: ExpressVPN is one of the premium options in a crowded market. Here is what it does well in 2026, where it falls short, and whether the higher price is justified.
content:
ExpressVPN has been a top-tier recommendation for years. In 2026, it remains one of the fastest and most reliable VPNs, but the price is higher than most competitors. Here is a direct assessment.

## Speed

ExpressVPN's Lightway protocol is its proprietary protocol built for speed. In testing, it consistently delivers excellent speeds, often within 10 percent of the unprotected connection speed. On long-distance connections (Europe to Asia Pacific), Lightway holds up better than most competing protocols. WireGuard is also available if you prefer the open-source option.

## Server Network

ExpressVPN operates servers in 105 countries, which is broader coverage than most competitors. If you need to appear to be in a specific country for content access or business use, ExpressVPN's country coverage is hard to beat. All servers are RAM-only (no persistent data storage).

## Privacy and Jurisdiction

ExpressVPN is incorporated in the British Virgin Islands, which has no data retention laws and is outside the jurisdiction of both the EU and the Five Eyes intelligence alliance. The company underwent an independent audit of its no-logs policy by KPMG in 2022, which confirmed it does not retain connection logs or browsing data. A 2019 incident in Turkey where Turkish authorities seized an ExpressVPN server did not reveal any user data, which was a practical test of the no-logs claim.

## Streaming Performance

ExpressVPN is one of the most reliable VPNs for streaming. It unblocks Netflix, Disney Plus, BBC iPlayer, Hulu, and most other major services consistently. If streaming is your primary use case, ExpressVPN is among the top two or three options available.

## Price

ExpressVPN is more expensive than most competitors. The 12-month plan typically costs around 6 to 8 dollars per month with a promotion, versus 3 to 4 dollars for NordVPN or Surfshark on similar term lengths. The question is whether the speed and reliability premium justifies the price difference.

## Verdict

ExpressVPN is a genuinely excellent service. The speed is best-in-class, the server coverage is broad, the streaming performance is reliable, and the privacy credentials are solid. If price is your primary concern, NordVPN or Surfshark offer similar capabilities for less. If you want the most reliable all-around VPN without compromise, ExpressVPN justifies its price.
